pipeline_audit_text: See website 'Methodology audit' section for the qualitative findings: synthetic Beyer/dosage for non-winners, hardcoded backtest fields, data-leaking implied_prob feature, near-uniform ML output, etc.

interpretation.headline: Best-of-5,000 search hits >= 22/40 in 87.4% of permuted-label runs.
interpretation.reading: If P(null >= 22) is ~5% or higher, '22/40 best of 5,000' is consistent with random search noise on permuted labels — i.e. the headline number is largely produced by the search procedure, not by genuine signal in the weights.
